title: Histotechnician
description: We're hiring a Histotechnician at Scripps Research. This is an exciting opportunity to join our scientific excellence, collaborative, impact-oriented team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Research, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Process and prepare tissue specimens for microscopic examination
Operate automated staining and processing equipment
Perform quality control testing on processed specimens
Maintain laboratory supplies and equipment functionality
Document specimen handling and maintain chain of custody
Support pathologists in preparing slides for diagnosis

requirements.education: Certificate in Histotechnology from accredited program
